content_en: It was narrated from Abu 'Abdur-Remb as-Sulami that 'Ali (&) said: '"There is no iCtik2f except in the mosque in which prayers are held in ~ongregation."'~~ According to another version: "There is no i'tik2f except in the main mosque of the city."140 Perhaps what he Financial and judiciary instie~tions at the time of 'Ali meant by that was that i'tikif should not be done except in the main mosque of the city, in which the Friday congregational prayer is held.14'
